entries.aggregateText: 5 FULL LIVES 12,840 SUN COINS 287 STARS Menu SUNNY POP TRAILS OF ORCHARD MAGIC Sunbeam Orchard • World 12 Play Level 128 Collect 24 honey drops and clear 18 jelly tiles. Today's Fun Short-session events and streak rewards designed for casual portrait play. DAILY STREAK Day 6 Bloom Finish one stage to unlock a rainbow rocket and 30 bonus coins. View Reward LIMITED EVENT Treasure Cruise Chain five win streaks to fill the picnic map and claim a golden chest. Open Event Road to Level 128 You are one win away from the orchard gate. Keep your boosters for the honey lane. WORLD PROGRESS 78% NEXT GOAL Honey Drop Rescue Use fewer than 20 moves to keep the streak chest alive. TEAM UPDATE Picnic Club Rank 3 Two more wins this week unlock the shared blossom chest. Booster Shelf Hammer x12 Shuffle x7 Rocket x9
